title: Spiral of Consciousness project architecture
details:
Project: Spiral of Consciousness (Спираль Сознания) — Astro 5 static site deployed to GitHub Pages + GitVerse Pages. 

Key architecture:
- web/ — Astro 5 + Preact + Tailwind CSS v4 + D3.js + Lunr.js
- site: https://alexandernarbaev.github.io/ThePath/
- base: /ThePath (all internal links must use /ThePath prefix)
- i18n: ru + en, routing: [lang]/pages
- Content Collections: modules (15), pages (index, manifesto, map)
- 47 static pages
- Dark/light theme with system detection
- Interactive: Search (⌘K), ProgressBar, BookmarkButton, PathTracker, DailyChecklist, EthicalCompass, ModuleGraph (D3)
- CI/CD: .github/workflows/deploy.yml (actions/deploy-pages), .gitverse/workflows/deploy.yml (peaceiris)

Content structure:
- 15 modules (0-canon through 14-production), each ~200-400 lines, RU + EN
- Module 1 has 4 new symbols: Bridge, Mirror, Threshold, Seed (Мост, Зеркало, Порог, Семя)
- ALL 15 modules have FAQ sections (~3-7 questions each) in both languages
- Manifesto + Map are separate content pages
- docs/ directory mirrors web/src/content/ for source documentation

Key files:
- astro.config.mjs: site URL, base, i18n config
- src/content/config.ts: Content Collection schemas
- src/i18n/ui.ts: all UI strings (RU+EN)
- src/i18n/modules.ts: module metadata
- src/i18n/paths.ts: study paths
- src/styles/global.css: Tailwind + design tokens

Critical constraints:
- All internal links must use /ThePath/ prefix (never relative)
- Content rendering uses await render() → <Content /> component
- getStaticPaths returns { lang: 'ru'/'en' } simple params, not from collection
- Module pages use getCollection + render()
- Nav/Sidebar/Breadcrumb use hardcoded '/ThePath' base
- Public folder files at root (favicon.ico etc.)

Git: dual remotes (origin=GitHub, gitverse=GitVerse), push to both
License: CC BY-SA 4.0
Version: Canon 2.1, rest 1.1, May 2026
